name: Edgemode, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Edgemode, Inc. was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada in 2011. Our subsidiary, Edgemode Wyoming, was incorporated in the State of Wyoming in March 2020. Between 2021 and 2023, we attempted to become a key figure in Bitcoin mining but lacked the necessary funding to finance the purchase of Bitcoin mining hardware and hosting contracts.
